name: Strata Decision Technology Healthcare Financial Planning API
what_it_does: Strata Decision Technology REST API for healthcare financial planning, analytics, and cost accounting platform. Enables AI agents to manage hospital operating budget creation and variance analysis data for financial planning automation, handle healthcare cost accounting and service line profitability data retrieval for financial analytics, access capital planning and capital budget tracking data for hospital facility investment decisions, retrieve clinical and financial integration data linking patient care data to cost accounting, handle purchased services and supply chain spend analytics for cost reduction, access physician and provider productivity and compensation analytics, retrieve long-range financial planning and scenario modeling data for strategic planning, manage labor productivity and staffing analytics data for workforce financial planning, handle decision support and volume forecast data for hospital capacity planning, and integrate healthcare financial data with ERP, Epic, and hospital information systems.
use_cases: Automating budget variance analysis from hospital finance agents
Tracking service line profitability from healthcare analytics agents
Modeling capital scenarios from strategic planning agents
Forecasting patient volumes from capacity planning agents
not_for: Physician practice billing without hospital-level financial planning
Non-healthcare financial planning without clinical-financial integration
SMB healthcare without enterprise health system budgeting complexity
best_when: A large health system, academic medical center, or hospital network using Strata wants AI agents to automate operating budget management, cost accounting analytics, capital planning, service line profitability reporting, and long-range financial modeling.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Strata manages hospital operating and capital budgets with board-level governance — automated budget modifications without CFO and board approval violates health system financial governance. Cost accounting data drives physician compensation models (wRVU-based); automated physician performance data changes without HR and medical staff review creates compensation disputes. Capital allocation automation without capital committee approval creates unauthorized spending commitments.

auth.notes: Strata Decision uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Per-health system credentials. No webhooks. REST API with JSON. Chicago, Illinois HQ. Part of Roper Technologies portfolio. 400+ health system clients including Mayo Clinic, Cedars-Sinai. Strong in academic medical centers and large integrated delivery networks. StrataJazz is the platform name. Competes with Kaufman Hall (Vizient), Oracle Hyperion, and Workday Adaptive Planning for healthcare financial planning.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; health system size and module pricing
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. Founded 2000. Part of Roper Technologies. 400+ health system clients. Mayo Clinic, Cedars-Sinai, Johns Hopkins among clients. StrataJazz platform covers budgeting, cost accounting, capital planning, and analytics. Deep Epic EHR integration. Competes with Kaufman Hall (Vizient), Oracle Hyperion, and Workday Adaptive Planning for health system FP&A.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; health system size dependent

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Hospital budget governance requires CFO and board approval for budget modifications; automated budget changes without proper governance chain violates health system financial controls
HIPAA protected financial data — Strata may contain PHI via clinical-financial cost accounting integration; automated data handling must maintain HIPAA compliance for patient-level cost data
Physician compensation sensitivity — cost accounting data directly linked to physician compensation models; automated physician productivity data changes require medical staff and HR review
Capital committee governance — capital allocation decisions require capital committee authorization; automated capital planning changes without governance review creates unauthorized commitment
Epic EHR integration dependency — Strata clinical-financial integration requires Epic data feeds; disruption to Epic integration affects cost accounting data currency
Health system fiscal year complexity — health systems use varied fiscal year structures; automated budget processing must handle fiscal year configuration correctly
agent_readiness.security_notes: Healthcare financial planning. SOC2, HIPAA, ISO27001. OAuth2/API key. US. Hospital budget and clinical-financial cost accounting data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Healthcare financial planning. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US. Hospital budget and financial data.
